title: Agent-FAQ
description: Multi-agent enterprise assistant automating customer query resolution. Designed a 5-agent architecture handling retrieval, verification, summarisation, and autonomous task execution. Implemented RAG using PostgreSQL pgvector and Redis caching reducing latency by 85%. Integrated Jira, Slack, and GitHub APIs for workflow automation.

title: Fairness Firewall
description: Enterprise AI bias auditing platform detecting systemic bias in tabular datasets. Implemented schema-agnostic pipelines identifying protected attributes automatically. Engineered Statistical Parity Difference modules enforcing the Four-Fifths Rule. Generated AI-powered executive audit reports recommending mitigation workflows.

title: KNRFarm
description: Cloud-native Android system managing herd lifecycle, inventory, and medical records. Implemented real-time Firestore synchronization achieving sub-second consistency. Integrated RBAC security layers protecting sensitive records. Built predictive pregnancy and vaccination scheduling workflows reducing missed events by 95%.
